title: SNDL Emerges as Canada's Leading Producer of Edibles with Indiva Acquisition
text: SNDL Inc. announced the successful closure of its acquisition of Indiva Limited's business and assets through court-approved proceedings under the Companies' Creditors Arrangement Act (Canada). The transaction was completed pursuant to an approval and reverse vesting order from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List). The consideration comprised a credit bid of all Indiva Group indebtedness owed to SNDL, retention of certain liabilities, and cash payments for priority indebtedness and CCAA proceedings costs. The estimated transaction value is $22.7 million. CEO Zach George stated: This acquisition reinforces SNDL's standing as a premier producer of cannabis products in Canada. The transaction includes a 40,000-square-foot production facility in London, Ontario, seven brands across 53 SKUs, and market-leading brands: Pearls by Grön, No Future, and Bhang Chocolate. The deal integrates Indiva's production capabilities and brand portfolio into SNDL's operations, establishing the company as recognized leadership position in cannabis edibles production. SNDL is Canada's largest private-sector liquor and cannabis retailer with multiple retail banners and a vertically integrated cannabis production operation specializing in cultivation, product innovation, and manufacturing.
